summary: Phase 3C: Transport Adapter Contract (External Boundary Lock). Creates fn_record_dispatch_result(uuid, text, text, text, jsonb) as the ONLY legal DB entry point for transport result reporting. Adds provider, external_message_id, delivered_at, failed_at, bounced_at columns to mid_ledger. Creates lcs.dispatch_event_log (SUPPORTING, CTB-registered, append-only — no UPDATE, no DELETE). Validates SENT state + terminal result_state, updates mid_ledger via existing FSM trigger, logs event row. Creates lcs_transport role (EXECUTE-only, no direct table writes). No RAISE-after-DML. 14 enforcement tests across 3 categories.

payload.boundary_rule: No transport adapter writes to tables directly. All dispatch outcomes go through fn_record_dispatch_result.
